news.headline: B. Braun introduces Emergency Department Single-Shot Nerve Block Tray in US market - Feb. 18, 2025. #RA #anesthesia
news.summary: In Bethlehem, Pennsylvania on February 18, 2025, B. Braun Medical Inc. unveiled the Emergency Department Single-Shot Nerve Block Tray to the U.S. market. The company, a leader in regional anesthesia (RA), introduced this product tailored for emergency use. The tray's launch signifies a significant step for B. Braun, marking a new addition to their offerings in the sector.

news.headline: Dow Jones down after talks, Warren Buffett boosts stocks. New leader rose, Nvidia surged, Meta dropped. Warren Buffett's stocks mentioned.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones experienced a decline in the stock market following U.S.-Russia discussions. A new stock endorsed by Warren Buffett saw a rise. While Nvidia witnessed a rally, Meta faced a drop. The stock market update indicates that the Dow Jones slipped, with significant movements seen in various key stocks. Warren Buffett showed interest in particular stocks, contributing to market fluctuations. Companies like Nvidia witnessed positive momentum, whereas Meta encountered a decline. This dynamic shift in the market reflects the impact of recent events and key players' decisions.

news.headline: Senator Thune: Senate to vote on Graham’s budget proposal this week.
Edifier introduces LolliClip Earbuds with Bluetooth 5.4, noise-cancellation, 39-hour battery life. Award-winning manufacturer.
news.summary: A leading manufacturer of premium sound systems, Edifier, based in Richmond, BC, revealed their latest product, the LolliClip Earbuds. These earbuds boast open-ear design, true wireless technology, noise-canceling feature, and Bluetooth 5.4 for enhanced connectivity. Additionally, they offer a multipoint connection and an impressive total battery life of up to 39 hours. This innovation signifies Edifier's commitment to delivering high-quality audio products to consumers.

news.headline: NYMEX WTI Crude March futures settle at $71.85 a barrel, 1.57%
NYMEX Gasoline March futures settle at $2.0867 a gallon
NYMEX Natural Gas March futures settle at $4.0070/MMBtu.
NYMEX Diesel March futures settle at $2.4406 a gallon
Sotherly Hotels Inc. (NASDAQ: SOHO) discloses 2024 dividend tax treatment for Series B, C, and D preferred shares.
news.summary: Sotherly Hotels Inc. declared the estimated income tax classification of its 2024 distributions on various preferred shares. The Series B preferred shares (CUSIP #83600C301), Series C preferred shares (CUSIP #83600C400), and Series D preferred shares (CUSIP #83600C509) are included in this announcement. The income tax classification for the 2024 distributions, to be reported on Form 1099-DIV, is detailed in the provided table. This update was released from Williamsburg, Virginia on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Graphite industry report for 2019-2034, including manufacturing, capacity, production, consumption, trade, and price analysis.
news.summary: A report titled "Graphite World, Regions and Countries Market Review 2019-2024 and Forecast to 2034" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report serves as a crucial source of information regarding the global graphite market. It presents comprehensive data on both global and regional markets, as well as specific countries, offering analysis from 2019 to 2024 along with forecasts extending to 2034 concerning supply, demand, prices, and downstream industries. The report contains a wealth of high-quality tables and figures.

news.headline: Analyst predicts revenue opportunities for CoreCivic in 2026, with Q4 revenue at $479.3M and FFO of 39 cents per share.
news.summary: Research analyst Jason Weaver from JonesResearch has reaffirmed a Buy rating and a price target of $28 for CoreCivic, Inc. (NYSE:CXW) post the release of its fourth-quarter results. The company reported revenue of $479.3 million, surpassing analysts' predictions of $465.17 million, along with funds from operations (FFO) of 39 cents per share, which also exceeded analyst estimates of 34 cents per share. CoreCivic anticipates its full-year 2025 net income to fall within the range of $53.5 million to $67.5 million and full-year FFO between $1.37 to $1.50 per share. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Northern Oil and Gas reports 131-132 MBoe daily production for Q4 2024, with $27M acquisitions and $231-$232M capex. CEO optimistic for future despite setbacks. 2025 production forecasted at 130-135 MBoe per day.
news.summary: Northern Oil and Gas, Inc. (NYSE:NOG) shared their operational update for the fourth quarter of 2024 and outlook for 2025. They anticipate a production rate of 131.0–132.0 thousand barrels of oil equivalent (MBoe) per day in Q4, which aligns with their yearly guidance. The company invested $27 million in Ground Game and leasehold acquisitions during the quarter. Additionally, capital expenditures for Q4 are estimated to range between $231 million and $232 million, excluding non-budgeted transactions. Despite challenges in late 2024 and early 2025, including a production slowdown, NOG's CEO Nick O’Grady highlighted a 25% production growth throughout 2024. Looking ahead, the company predicts a production range of 130.0–135.0 MBoe per day for 2025.

news.headline: Asbury Automotive buys Herb Chambers for $1.34 billion, acquiring 33 dealerships and 52 franchises, targeting $2.9 billion revenue in 2024.
news.summary: Shares of Asbury Automotive Group Inc (NYSE:ABG) are experiencing a decline today after the company announced a significant acquisition. As part of a $1.34 billion agreement, Asbury will be acquiring The Herb Chambers Companies. This deal includes 33 dealerships, 52 franchises, and three collision centers operated by Herb Chambers, which collectively generated $2.9 billion in revenue in 2024. The transaction is set to be finalized in the latter part of the second quarter of 2025, pending standard regulatory approvals. Funding for the acquisition will come from a combination of credit facilities, mortgage proceeds, and cash reserves. Herb Chambers, the owner of The Herb Chambers Companies, ... (Full details can be found on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: Mowi ASA employee buys 1,135 shares at NOK 220 each, now owns 1,835 shares.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Eivind Kallbekken, a board representative at Mowi ASA, acquired 1,135 company shares for NOK 220.00 each. Consequently, Kallbekken now possesses a total of 1,835 shares in Mowi ASA.

news.headline: Inflation expectations on the rise as numbers worsen.
Lynn Fusco & Jeffrey Horstman named co-chairs of The Hole in the Wall Gang Camp board; new members and change in leadership announced.
news.summary: New Haven, CT - On February 18, 2025, The Hole in the Wall Gang Camp announced the addition of actress Ana Villafañe and Erin Rodliff to its board. Former chair Ray Lamontagne has transitioned to a new role within the organization. The camp, renowned for offering unique healing experiences to children with severe illnesses and their families, continues its mission of providing support.

news.headline: BAB, Inc. reported fiscal year-end results with revenues of $3.5M and net income of $525K, up from $3.5M and $467K in 2023.
news.summary: Deerfield, Illinois – On February 18, 2025, BAB, Inc. (OTCQB: BABB) disclosed its financial outcomes for the fiscal year ending on November 30, 2024. The company reported a net income of $525,000, equivalent to $0.07 per share. In this period, BAB, Inc. generated revenues amounting to $3,545,000. When compared to the preceding year ending on November 30, 2023, where the company had revenues of $3,510,000 and net income of $467,000 ($0.06 per share), there was notable growth in both revenue and net income for the fiscal year 2024.

news.headline: AI Unlimited Group files S-1 registration, shifts to growth phase with institutional capital. New board appointments strengthen leadership.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, AI Unlimited Group, Inc. (AIUG) reached a crucial point in its development by filing its S-1 registration statement, signifying a shift from initial growth to a phase of rapid advancement supported by institutional funds. To bolster this transformation, the company has enhanced its leadership team by adding experienced industry professionals to its Nominee Board of Directors. This move emphasizes AIUG's dedication to operational efficiency, technological innovation, and extending its presence in the market.

news.headline: Laura Mercier expands with Amazon launch, providing high-performing beauty products - adding  Prime option.
news.summary: Renowned beauty brand Laura Mercier has expanded its reach by launching in the Amazon U.S. Premium Beauty Store. The brand aims to provide accessible, high-performing, and effortless beauty products. Customers can now enjoy the convenience of purchasing Laura Mercier products through Buy with Prime on the brand's direct-to-customer site. This move, announced on February 18, 2025, signifies a significant step for the brand to reach a larger audience.

news.headline: Crude oil gains 1.5%; Fluor shares plunge after downbeat earnings. Dow down 0.38%, Nasdaq drops 0.47%, S&P 500 falls 0.16%. Energy shares rose 1.8%. NY Empire State Manufacturing Index jumped 18.3 points to +5.7 in February. GeneDx Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ:WGS) shares rise 35% to $102.77.
news.summary: Stocks in the U.S. market saw a decline at the close of trading, with the Nasdaq Composite dropping by approximately 100 points on Tuesday. The Dow went down by 0.38% to 44,378.28, while the NASDAQ fell by 0.47% to 19,932.75, and the S&P 500 decreased by 0.16% to 6,105.15. Energy sector shares surged by 1.8% while communication services shares fell by 1%. The NY Empire State Manufacturing Index saw an increase of 18.3 points to +5.7 in February, surpassing the expected -1. GeneDx Holdings Corp. witnessed a 35% rise in shares to $102.77 following the release of FY25 revenue guidance. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Wall Street analysts anticipate Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) to report Q4 earnings of 70 cents/share on $7.05B revenue. Stock price closed at $48.06 on Friday.
news.summary: Occidental Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:OXY) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on February 18, 2025, after market close. Analysts forecast earnings per share at 70 cents, a decrease from 74 cents a year ago, while quarterly revenue is projected at $7.05 billion, down from $7.53 billion in the previous year. Ecopetrol S.A. (NYSE:EC) revealed joint plans with Occidental Petroleum to extend the Rodeo Midland Basin development plan in the Permian Basin, Texas, USA. OXY stock rose by 0.4% to $48.06 on Friday. For more analyst ratings, visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.

news.headline: Naf Naf Middle Eastern Grill partners with Chicago Fire FC as official sponsor, uniting two Chicago originals.
news.summary: Naf Naf Middle Eastern Grill has announced a new partnership with Chicago Fire FC as the team's official restaurant and catering sponsor starting from February 18, 2025. This new collaboration will bring together the vibrant and authentic Middle Eastern cuisine of Naf Naf with the renowned soccer team. The partnership aims to enhance the dining experience for soccer fans and will feature Naf Naf's flavorful dishes at team events and catering services.

news.headline: Tambourine wins recognition in 2024 HSMAI Adrian Awards. Marketing tech company for hotels globally based in Ft. Lauderdale.
news.summary: Fort Lauderdale, Florida - Tambourine, a global marketing technology company based in Fort Lauderdale specializing in serving hotels, resorts, and tourist destinations, has been honored in the 2024 Hospitality Sales and Marketing Association International awards.

news.headline: LAZ Parking and Epic Charging collaborate to install EV chargers in 50,000 parking spaces across US.
news.summary: In Hartford, Connecticut and Belmont, California on February 18, 2025, LAZ Parking, the primary privately owned parking operator in the U.S. undergoing rapid growth, has strategically partnered with Epic Charging, a top player in EV charging software solutions. LAZ Parking stands as the largest operator in the country, showing exponential growth in its operations, while Epic Charging specializes in software solutions for electric vehicle charging systems. The collaboration between the two companies aims to leverage their respective expertise in parking and EV charging technologies for mutual benefit.

news.headline: West Red Lake Gold files NI 43-101 Pre-Feasibility Study for Madsen Mine in Red Lake, showing the report has an effective date of January 7, 2025.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on Feb. 18, 2025, West Red Lake Gold Mines Ltd. shared the release of its independent pre-feasibility study report for its Madsen Mine project situated in the Red Lake Gold District in Ontario, Canada. The report has an effective date of January 7, 2025. West Red Lake Gold, listed on TSXV as WRLG and OTCQB as WRLGF, owns 100% of the Madsen Mine project. This study marks a significant step in the development of the mine and provides valuable insights for the company's operations.

news.summary: In Pune, India, as of February 18, 2025, the worldwide market for Wi-Fi chipsets is set to experience significant growth due to the rising need for fast wireless connections in different sectors. With a value of USD 29.27 billion in 2022, the market is projected to grow at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of...

news.headline: Arogo Capital Acquisition Corp. agrees on a deal with Bangkok Tellink Co., Ltd. worth USD350 million in equity value.
news.summary: The suggested deal indicates an equity value, on a pro-forma basis, totaling USD350 million for the combined company.

news.headline: 'Hamster Kombat' game returns with delay, TON token hits record low amid launch of new tap-to-earn feature.
news.summary: After a delayed return, Hamster Kombat has introduced a new tap-to-earn game, marking its comeback. Unfortunately, the TON token associated with the game has plummeted to a record low.

news.headline: Duke Energy in Charlotte, N.C. prepares for winter storm: snow and ice may cause power outages, customers urged to prepare.
news.summary: In certain areas, a combination of snow and ice is forecasted to potentially lead to power outages, prompting customers to make necessary preparations. Duke Energy, based in Charlotte, N.C., is actively monitoring the situation and readying for the impact of the weather. The company urges customers to be proactive in readiness for potential power disruptions due to the adverse weather conditions. Stay tuned for updates as the situation progresses.

news.headline: Cleveland Heights partners with Leopard Energy, saving $33.6M in 20 years on utility and operating costs.
news.summary: In Cleveland Heights, Ohio, a groundbreaking collaboration has commenced in 2025 to tackle crucial energy and operational enhancements for aging infrastructure. This unique partnership aims to provide the City of Cleveland Heights with substantial cost savings.

news.headline: Mobix Labs reports strong Q1 2025 results with continued revenue growth; CEO cites strategic acquisitions & product expansion.
news.summary: Irvine-based company Mobix Labs, Inc. (Nasdaq: MOBX) revealed its fiscal performance for the initial quarter of 2025 that concluded on December 31, 2024. CEO Fabian Battaglia expressed satisfaction with the robust beginning to the fiscal year, highlighting ongoing revenue expansion. The firm's success was credited to strategic acquisitions and the broadening product range, which stimulated demand in crucial industries.

news.headline: Casey's to report Q3 fiscal 2025 results on March 11 and hold conference call on March 12 at 7:30 am central time.
news.summary: An Iowa-based convenience store chain, Casey’s General Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ: CASY), is set to release its third quarter fiscal 2025 results on March 11th, 2025, after the market closes. The company, a prominent player in the U.S. convenience store industry, will conduct a conference call and webcast on March 12th at 7:30 am Central Time to discuss the financial outcomes. Interested parties can access a live webcast of the event through Casey’s website on the Investor Relations page at https://investor.caseys.com.

news.headline: PotlatchDeltic executives presenting at 3 investor conferences. Time for first conference: 1:15 PM Eastern on Feb. 27.
news.summary: Spokane, Washington - PotlatchDeltic Corporation (Nasdaq: PCH) disclosed that Eric J. Cremers, President and CEO, along with Wayne Wasechek, VP and CFO, will present a company overview at three Investor Conferences. These presentations are set for the 2025 BofA Global Agriculture and Materials Conference on February 27 at 1:15 PM ET, and the 46th Annual Raymond James Institutional Investors Conference.

news.headline: Alume Biosciences names Kaveri Parker Chief Business Officer, enhancing their nerve technology.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Alume Biosciences, a biotechnology company in late-clinical stage, revealed the appointment of Kaveri Parker, Ph.D., as their new Chief Business Officer. The company specializes in developing nerve illuminating technology aimed at enhancing surgical safety. Dr. Parker's role will involve overseeing strategic business operations for the company.

news.headline: Kroger offers Express Delivery for fast online shopping, bringing store items to customers' doors in a pinch. #Kroger #ExpressDelivery #FastestOnlineDelivery
news.summary: A renowned retailer, The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR), announced the introduction of its Express Delivery service on February 18, 2025, in Cincinnati. The service prides itself on providing swift online deliveries comparable to in-store shopping, reiterating that customers can avail themselves of the same prices. This expedited service aims to cater to customers who require urgent delivery of items from the store directly to their doorstep.

news.headline: Zhang Financial, #1 Independent Financial Advisor, opens office in Chicago at the John Hancock Building.
news.summary: A well-known fee-only wealth management firm, Zhang Financial, has recently inaugurated its new office in Chicago on February 18, 2025. Situated in the prestigious John Hancock Building at 875 North Michigan Avenue, this development signifies a notable achievement for the company.

news.headline: Red Canary named to CRN's 2025 Security 100 List in Endpoint and Managed Security category. Prestigious industry award.
news.summary: A prominent company in managed detection and response (MDR) has initiated its new fiscal year by receiving a prestigious industry award in the Endpoint and Managed Security category. On February 18, 2025, in Denver, Red Canary, a leading MDR provider, was acknowledged by CRN® for its excellence.

news.headline: GasTech Engineering partners with Limitless Space Institute to support STEM program, inspiring young innovators. Chairman of Axiom Space, Kam Ghaffarian, leads initiative.
news.summary: GasTech Engineering has recently revealed their sponsorship of the Limitless Space Institute (LSI), a renowned STEM initiative established by Kam Ghaffarian, the chairman of Axiom Space. The program aims to inspire and educate individuals in the fields of science, technology, engineering, and mathematics. The announcement was made on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Feniex Industries achieves $200 million in sales, doubling growth pace in less than a decade.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on February 18, 2025, Feniex Industries, a renowned company specializing in emergency vehicle warning technology, has revealed that they have reached a significant milestone by exceeding $200 million in total sales. It took the company ten years to achieve their first $100 million in sales back in 2020, and remarkably, they managed to double that figure in a shorter time frame.

news.headline: American Skin Association awarded Candid's 2025 Platinum Seal of Transparency and Charity Navigator's Four-Star Rating.
news.summary: In New York on February 18, 2025, the American Skin Association (ASA) revealed their achievement of receiving Candid's 2025 Platinum Seal of Transparency and a Four-Star Rating from Charity Navigator. This recognition is significant as Candid is known as the world's largest provider of information on nonprofit organizations. It highlights the ASA's commitment to transparency and effectiveness in their operations.

news.headline: McGuinn Homes Inc restructures operations for growth in South Carolina markets, appointing Division Presidents.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 18, 2025, in West Columbia, S.C., McGuinn Homes Inc. revealed plans for a corporate restructuring aimed at enhancing its presence in South Carolina. The company plans to bolster its expansion efforts in three key markets within the state. As part of this restructuring, McGuinn Homes Inc. will be appointing Division Presidents to oversee operations in each of these standalone markets. This strategic move is intended to strengthen the company's foothold and drive growth in South Carolina.

news.headline: Hydron Energy receives funding support from NRC IRAP for rare gas production and air capture solution.
news.summary: In North Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 18, 2025, Hydron Energy Inc. revealed they are tackling carbon emissions in challenging sectors and disclosed they are obtaining financial backing from the National Research Council of Canada Industrial Research Assistance Program (NRC IRAP) and Innovate Canada.

news.headline: Swedish brand Stinaa.J introduces orthopedic footwear to U.S. with Fall collection on Bloomingdales.com & Nordstrom.com.
news.summary: A Swedish orthopedic footwear brand, Stinaa.J, launched its Fall collection on Bloomingdales.com and Nordstrom.com for its U.S. debut in late 2024. The brand is known for redefining the connection between science, design, and overall body wellness.

news.headline: Verb Biotics' LP815™ GABA Probiotic benefits companion animals' behavior; offers natural solution. Est. 2/18/25.
news.summary: As more and more pet guardians look for natural and scientifically proven remedies to address behavioral issues such as anxiety and aggression in their pets, there is a growing interest in groundbreaking microbiome-based interventions. In Boulder, Colorado, on February 18, 2025, Verb Biotics LLC, a leading biotech company, is gaining recognition for its innovative approach in this field.

news.headline: BASE FOOD enters U.S. market, debuts BASE Cookies; aims for health-conscious Americans. TOKYO, Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: Japanese food-tech company, BASE FOOD, Inc., aims to reach health-conscious American consumers and potential partners in the United States by offering nutrient-enhanced products. The Tokyo-based company made this announcement on February 18, 2025. BASE FOOD, Inc. is known for its innovative approach in the food-tech sector and plans to introduce products with boosted nutrients. This move is expected to capture the interest of a wide range of Americans looking for healthier food alternatives.

news.headline: MSI celebrates 50 years as a top supplier of flooring, countertops and more in North America.
news.summary: Orange, California - M S International, Inc. (MSI), the top provider of flooring, countertops, wall tile, and hardscaping products in North America, proudly reveals that this year signifies the company's 50th year in operation. The company was initially established in the year 1975, and it has since become a market leader in the industry. Celebrating half a century of success and growth, MSI continues to deliver quality products and services to its customers.

news.headline: Creative Science offers free lifetime registration for pets affected by Save This Life microchip registry shutdown in 2025.
news.summary: In Orange City, Iowa, as of February 18, 2025, Creative Science®, a renowned provider of animal health products, is taking action to assist pet owners, veterinary clinics, and shelters impacted by the closure of the Save This Life (STL) pet microchip database. The company's reliable microchip services are being offered to help mitigate the challenges caused by the shutdown of the STL registry.

news.headline: Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson's brand PAPATUI launches Ageless Action Under Eye Patches nationwide. #MensCare #Innovation
news.summary: Recently, PAPATUI has introduced its latest product, the Ageless Action Under Eye Patches, across the country. Founded by Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson, PAPATUI Men's Care is making strides in the men's grooming industry. The launch of the new product comes as the brand seeks to cater to the needs of male consumers. This announcement was made on February 18, 2025, in New York.

news.headline: Robinhood plans to launch Singapore crypto offerings in 2025 through Bitstamp Ltd for $200 million, expanding global growth.
news.summary: Robinhood Markets Inc is set to offer crypto services in Singapore by 2025 through a Bitstamp Ltd subsidiary. The company made this announcement following the acquisition of Bitstamp for $200 million in June 2024. Robinhood plans to comply with regulatory guidance and launch their crypto offerings in Singapore by 2025. According to an interview with Robinhood Crypto's vice president and general manager Johann Kerbrat, the company aims to leverage Bitstamp's licenses with Singapore and institutional business for this endeavor. This expansion is part of Robinhood's strategy to tap into international markets and broaden its crypto product offerings.

news.headline: Former OpenAI CTO, Mira Murati, co-founds Thinking Machines Lab, an AI startup, after leaving OpenAI in [year].
news.summary: After departing from OpenAI in the previous year, Mira Murati has played a key role in founding the Thinking Machines Lab, a fresh startup focused on artificial intelligence.
